settings.ttlPrompt: Ginaaw ñaata fan yu amul benn liggéey lañu wara efaase kontu bi?
settings.sqQuestion1: What was the name of your first pet?
settings.sqQuestion2: What city were you born in?
settings.sqQuestion3: What was your favorite childhood movie?
settings.sqSetupDesc: Soo fàttee sa baatu-jàll, mën nga jot ci tontu ñatti laaj. Mën nga jëfandikoo say laaj wala laaj yiñ la jox.
settings.sqFillAll: Nanga def laaj ak tontu yépp
settings.pwReminderTitle: Ndax yaa ngi fàttaliku sa baatu-jàll?
settings.pwReminderDesc: Saytu weer wu nekk — fexeel nga fàttaliku sa baatu-jàll ngir dugg.
settings.pwIncorrectDesc: Noo ngi lay digal nga yeesal sa baatu-jàll balaa ngay dugg, ngir nga bañ a ñàkka dugg.
settings.clearCacheConfirm:

settings.cacheCleared: Cache bi dafa fomp. Caabi yi denc nañu leen.

settings.waitDaysWarning: 7 fan weesuwul ba leegi. Baalnu nga xaar {daysLeft} yeneen fan.

settings.sessionTooNew: Sesioŋ bi bees na lool (7 fan lañuy laaj)
settings.sessionLimitRemoved: Dindi nañu àppu sesioŋ bi (amul àpp)

3. Sarsewaat xët wi

panic.callSettingsNote: Xam: Yoon TCP ak Relay mën nañu yokk waxtu wëy gannaaw amaat yombalkat wu ndaw. Traffic masking yokk ñëwël random ci SDP sessions.
panic.desc: Xam-xam bëpp ci node bii dinañu jëm ci kanam. Liggéeyukaay bii mën du jubbante.
panic.filesDestroyed: Xeet yi ak miidiya yi jëm nañu ci kanam
panic.msgsDeleted: Xariin yi bëpp jëm nañu ci kanam
panic.warningBody:
Yaa ngi waaja yaxxaareb njoxe yépp ba fàww.
Jëf jii mënoo ko delloo.
panic.allTracesRemoved: dindi nañu bépp lëndëm. Sesioŋ bii jeexna.

privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Loxo kër bu bees bi mun — yombal jumtukaay yëpp yi (E2E encrypted)
privacy.backupHint: Tekki loxo yi bëpp ak yoon sirr bi ci server bi. Jàmm jumtukaay bi wees — jubbante ak yoon rekk.
privacy.crossSignHint: Seet jumtukaay yu bees yombalkat ci yoon HMAC (mbëgg top)
privacy.federatedHint: Feral biitu garaale yi encrypted ci nodes federation (xëtu Shamir). Server bi daw te — jubbante ci yoon peers.
privacy.historySyncHint: Kopi encrypted xariin yi ci jumtukaay yi bëpp. Server xool ñëwël rekk
privacy.ktHint: Defteru yokk rekk yi wees neexa loxo yaltinde yi ak silsile hash (Merkle). Server seet kala — sogon yi xool ci seetaane.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Yóbbeel loxo yi ci jumtukaay bu bees ci kodu 6 xariin. Loxo yi hiindee ECIES — server mën du jàng.
privacy.ssssHint: Wàcciku loxo master bi ci N biitu Shamir. Biit M mën nañu jubbante loxo bi. Kala biit sirr na faan seetaan bu dëgg (ECIES). Server xool blobs encrypted rekk.
privacy.title: Sirr

keyBackup.passphraseMinLen: Baatu-jàll bi dafa wara am 8 araf ci gëna néew
keyBackup.keysTransferred: Toxal caabi yi ci aparey bu bees
keyBackup.enterCodeOnMain: Bindal kode bii ci sa aparey bu mag
keyBackup.codeValid: Kod bi dafay baax ci {n} simili
keyBackup.invalidOrExpiredCode: Kod bu baaxul wala bu jeex
keyBackup.noMasterKey: Amul caabi bu mag buñu wara xaaj
keyBackup.passphraseEncryptHint: Bindal ab baatu-jàll ngir enkripsioŋ. Nga bàyyi sa xel ci ni, doo mëna wér te amul.
keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Bindal baatu-jàll bi nga jëfandikoo bi ngay sos sauvegarde bi.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: efaase caabi sauvegarde? Jëf jooju mënul dellu ginaaw.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Dindi bépp action bu am solo? Recovery jaaraleko ci kontakt yu wóor dina nekk lu jafe.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Sa caabi master dina ñu ko xaaj N action ci jëfandikoo xeetu Shamir. Bépp action M dina may ñu delloosi caabi yi. Bépp séddoo dañu ko enkripte ngir benn jokkookat buñu wóolu.
keyBackup.thresholdLabel: Limite M (action yu gëna ndaw ngir delloosi)
keyBackup.thresholdRange: Buntu bi dafa wara tollu ci diggante 2 ba {max}
keyBackup.noContactsWithKeys: Amul benn jokkoo ak caabi publik
keyBackup.minTwoPeers: Soo bëggee am 2 peer yu ànd ak encryption
keyBackup.deleteFederatedConfirm: efaase sauvegarde federaal? Shards yi ci peer yi dina ñu des, waaye metadata yi dina ñu réer.

botConstructor.title: Tabaxkat Bot
botConstructor.subtitle: Defar sa bot ci gis-gis — soxlawolen kode
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Mesaasu dalal jëfandikukat bi tàmbali bot bi...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Dalal ak jàmm! Man maay sa bot. Jëfandikool /help ngir gis ndigal yi.
botConstructor.defaultHelp:
Komànd yi jàppandi:
/help — Wane mesaas bii
botConstructor.notifyOnEvent: Dafay tàmbali su jëfandikukat bi yónnee mesaas
botConstructor.docsCommand: Dafay tontu su jëfandikukat bi yónnee benn ndigal (lu melni /help, /start). Mën nga yokk jéegoy waxtaan ngir sos dialog yu bari jéego.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Dafay tontu su mesaasu jëfandikukat bi méngoo ak benn motif. Jëfandikoo regex - lu melni "Nanga def|nanga def" méngoo na ak ñaari baat yi. Du xàmmee majuscule.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Jëfandikukat yi dañuy gis mesaas bi njëkk suñu tàmbalee bot bi ak /start. Bépp bot war na am benn.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Yonnee mesaas ci saasi ci jamono. Dina baax ci fàttaliku bis bu nekk, digest ayu-bis bu nekk, wala yëgle yuy faral di am.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Branch logique bot bi. Saytu benn variable wala dugal jëfandikukat bi nga tontu ci anam wu wuute lepp di aju ci resultaa bi.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot bi dafay tànnee benn tontu ci limu tontu yi. Dina baax ci kaf, xelal, nuyoo wala tontu yu bari.
botConstructor.docsApi: Defal ab laaj HTTP ci benn API bu biti ba noppi jëfandikoo tontu bi ci mesaasu bot bi. Jëfandikool {data.field} ngir joxe royuwaay ci barabi tontu yi.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Yonnee ab yëgle admin saal bi suñu ko triggere. Dafa am njariñ ci àrtu yi, yëgle jëfandikukat yu bees yi, wala moderaasioŋ.
botConstructor.docsConversations: Waxtaan yu am jéego yu bari
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Yokk jéego ci benn bloku komand ngir sos dialog yuy weccoo xalaat. Jéego bu nekk dafay laaj benn laaj, xaar tontu jëfandikukat bi, ba noppi denc ko ci benn variable. Jëfandikool ay variable ci tontu bu mujj bi ak {Turu variable}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Jëfandikool parenthèse yu xawa laxasu {variable} ci bind tontu ngir dugal valeur yuy soppiku. Variable yu nekk dañuy wéy ci mesaas yi.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Variables yiñ tabax ci tontu bu nekk:
botConstructor.docsVarFirstName: Tur wi jëfandikukat bi di wane
botConstructor.docsVarIsAdmin: Dëgg la sudee jëfandikukat bi mooy admin/boroom
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: Mën nga jëfandikoo formataasu HTML ci tontu yi:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Tambalil ci ab bloku dalal - mooy li jëfandikukat yi njëkka gis
botConstructor.docsTip2: Yokk ab /help komand buy lim bépp komand bu jàppandi
botConstructor.docsTip3: Jëfandikool jéegoy waxtaan ngir bind sa tur, saytu wala dajale ay done
botConstructor.docsTip4: boole ay bloku anam ak ay variable ngir am branching bu xarañ
botConstructor.docsTip5: Natt sa bot ci waxtaan ak moom ci biir néeg ginaaw biñu ko dugalee

gravitixDocs.title: Royuwaayu làkku Gravitix
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Làkku scripting bu am doole ngir defar ay robot. 96 man-man. Backend bu xoosu.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix làkk la buñ jagleel benn domen (DSL) ñu defaree ko ci suuf ngir bind robot Vortex. Fépp fu yeneen làkk yi soxla bibliotek, woowaat, ak boilerplate, Gravitix daf lay jox ay jëfandikukatu xew-xew yu njëkk, ay waxtaan, ak nekkin buñ tabax - lépp ci syntax bu sell, buñu mëna jàng bu Rust inspiré.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Liñ mëna jàng - kode bi dafay jàng ni mébet, du masin
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Kaaraange - xeetu static jàpp njuumte yi laata runtime
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Expressif - naaw, garde, ak motif méngoo dañu tabax ci biir
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Minimal - amul klaas, amul ndono, amul kaadar ngir jàng
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: Gravitix mooy ngir képp ku bëgga defar bot Vortex ci lu gaaw - moo xam musul bind kode ci sa àdduna, wala developpeur bu xarañ nga te sonn nga ci Python boilerplate. Royuwaay bii dafay jàngal Gravitix ci njàngale yu njëkk yi: soxlawul nga am jaar-jaar.
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Wàll wu nekk dafay tabax ci wàll yi ko jiitu. Sooy sooga dugg ci prograam, jàngal ko ci kaw ba ci suuf. Sudee xam nga beneen làkk, jëfandikoo limu ëmbiit li ngir dem ci li la neex.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Yoonu gëna gaaw joge ci zero dem ci bot buy daw.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: on /start { ... } — dafay màndargaal jëfandikukat buy daw su jëfandikukat bi yónnee /start. emit "..." — dafay yónnee jëfandikukat bi mesaas. {ctx.first_name} — dafay boole tur jëfandikukat bi ci buum gi.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Ci biir Gravitix IDE, bësal mbusu Dox bi ci bar bi ci kaw. Bindal sa jeton Vortex Bot suñu la laajee. Bot bi dafay tàmbali ci saasi — soxlawul benn jéego ngir tabax.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Bépp prograamu Gravitix dafa tabax ci ñatti mbir yu am solo: jëfandikukat yi, kàddu yiy génne, ak logique.
gravitixDocs.multipleEmits: Emit yu bari = mesaas yu bari
gravitixDocs.multipleHandlers: ay jëfandikukat yu bari ngir benn dekkileer
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Bépp valeur ci Gravitix amna xeetam. Sistemu xeetu mbir yi dafay taxaw: xeetu mbir yi dañu leen di saytu ci waxtu compilation, balaa sa bot di dox.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Operatër yi dañuy boole valeur yi ngir génne valeur yu bees.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Chaînes yi ci Gravitix dañuy kode UTF-8. Dañu jàppale interpolation bu am solo ak ay jëf yuñ tabax ci biir.
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Motif-match ab valeur ak motif yu bari. Xalaatal ko ni kàddu coppite bu am doole.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Fonction yi ay bloku kode lañu yuñ mëna jëfandikoowaat. Dañu lay jàppale nga moytu baamtu mbir yi, ba noppi gëna yombal xam kode bi.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Ñi yor bot yi ñooy xol bot Gravitix. Bépp jëfandikukat dafay déglu benn xeetu xew-xew ba noppi daw su xew-xew boobu amee.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Garde yi dañu lay may nga yokk benn condition ci handler bi. jëfandikukat bi du daw ludul sudee garde bi jàngat na true.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Mbir ctx mingi jàppandi ci saasi ci biir bépp jëfandikukat. Dafay def ay leeral ci mesaas bi fi nekk ak jëfandikukat bi ko yónnee.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: State dafay may sa bot mu fàttaliku mbir yi ci diggante mesaas yi. Su etaa bi amul, mesaas bu nekk moom boppam te bot bi amul mémoire.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Flows daf lay may nga bind waxtaan yu bari ci anam wu yomb te neex lire. Flow mën na noppalu ngir xaar mesaas bi ci topp ci jëfandikukat bi.
gravitixDocs.multiStepForm: Formulaire bu am jéego yu bari
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: Yonnee mesaas mooy li njëkk ci génnug bot bi.
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Doxal kode ci saasi ci waxtu - amul liggéey cron, amul soxla sarwis yu biti.
gravitixDocs.everyRepeat: saa yu nekk — baamtu ci ab diir
gravitixDocs.atSpecificTime: at — daw ci benn waxtu ci bis bi
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Operatëru pipe bi |> dafay joxe benn valeur muy argument bu njëkk ci fonction bi ci topp. Dafay tax ñu mëna jàng jëfandikoo chaîne, cammoñ dem ndeyjoor.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Gravitix dafay joxe njuumte yuñ yamale ak ay blok jéem / jàpp / mujjee.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Structs daf lay may nga boole ay done yu jëm ci benn xeetu tur. Enums yi dañuy màndargaal xeetu variant yu tëju.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: Gravitix dafay yónnee ab bibliothèque math bu mat te am ~180 fonction.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: Gravitix amna xeetu complexe bu am solo - ñaari flotër yu 64-bit yuy wane wàll yi dëgg ak yi ñuy xalaat.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: Gravitix dafa amaale calcul numérique: derivatif ak integral yuñ xayma ci fonction yuñ tànn.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Algèbre lineaire mooy math vecteur ak matris.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Teori lim dafay jàngat màndarga lim yu mat yi. Fondaasioŋ kriptografi bu bees.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Statistique dafay joxe jumtukaay ngir leeral, jàngat ak jële ay conclusion ci done yi.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Fonction yu yam yi ñooy saafara equation différentiel yu am solo yi.
gravitixDocs.gammaRelated: Gamma ak ay fonction yu ko méngoo
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Soppi Fourier dafay xaaj siñaal bi ci fréquence yi ko bokk.
gravitixDocs.envVars: Mbir yiy soppiku ci environmaa bi
gravitixDocs.bp1: Deel saa yu nekk def luñu xamul
gravitixDocs.bp3: Jëfandikool ay garde ci palaasu if-chains ngir am ndigal
gravitixDocs.bp5: Jëfandikool teela dellu ngir wàññi nesting
gravitixDocs.bp6: Wax mbir yi ci anam wu leer
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Li gëna am solo ngir jàng Gravitix mooy tabax. Toogal ci echo bot bu yomb, nga yokk ci etaa, ba noppi nga yokk ci ay flow. Bépp konsept bu bees boo jàng, daf lay ubbi yeneen pexe.
